name: You're fired: An elf needs your job
description:
Lyriel, your company's HR manager, called you in today to tell you that you are fired so the company can hire an elf to replace you. The company wants to hire more elves so it can get more ideas from different backgrounds, and although you do decent hard work at the company, you are the least skilled human in the company, so they decided to fire you out of all the humans in the company.

Do you clean out your desk...or do you tell Lyriel that you are not gonna be fired that easily?
creator: VRCat
